---
title: "week1"
format: html
---

# #1

# Getting Started with Remote Sensing

#### Summary

Going into the first week of remote sensing, I wasn't really sure what are we going to learn. Although I have a lot experience on remote sensing, I am very unsure about what new strategy are we going to use in our module since I have never encountered satellite image.

I always keen to learn satellite basics, and I believe every advanced research is based on a good understanding of basic knowledge.

#### Application

(TBC)

#### Reflection

(TBC)

#### References
